{%- assign co = site.company -%}
{%- assign c = site.data.content -%}
# Sense of Tech

> Sense of Tech is a Belgium-based technology company founded by Adrien Clerbois (Microsoft MVP). It helps companies, SMEs and independents with AI-assisted engineering, custom application development, application modernization, software consulting & architecture, coaching & training, and conferences. The site is bilingual (French / English).

Key facts:
- Founder: {{ co.founder }} (Microsoft MVP)
- Location: {{ co.street }}, {{ co.postal_code }} {{ co.city }}, {{ co.country }}
- Email: {{ co.email }} — Phone: {{ co.phone_display }} — VAT: {{ co.vat }}
- Website: {{ site.url }}/
- Languages: French, English
